summary.intent: Build a polished Electron app UI using Mantine components with dark mode support, improved session management features (copy-to-clipboard, activity indicators, expandable rows), a chat-style session detail view, and the ability to spawn new Claude Code sessions from open items.
summary.outcome: Successfully migrated all UI components to Mantine v7, implemented full dark/light mode with light-dark() CSS function, redesigned the session detail page as a chat transcript with nested tool uses, added breadcrumb navigation, relative timestamps, and a working 'spawn session' feature that uses the Claude Agent SDK with settingSources to properly trigger gossamer hooks and appear in Active Sessions.

repo: Gossamer is an Electron + electron-vite + React + React Router (MemoryRouter) app monitoring Claude Code sessions via hooks writing to SQLite (~/.claude/hook-handler.db)
Hook handler at /opt/homebrew/bin/claude-hook-handler reads stdin events and writes to SQLite; hooks configured in ~/.claude/settings.json
The gossamer server entrypoint is dist/handler.js serve --db ~/.claude/hook-handler.db --port 3000
Claude Code SDK (query()) bypasses the CLI entirely and calls the API directly — hooks never fire unless settingSources: ['user', 'project'] is passed
CLAUDECODE env var is inherited by child processes started from within a Claude Code session, blocking nested claude invocations; must be deleted at server startup
CheckpointSessionMetadata.createdAt is the source for checkpoint creation timestamps (CheckpointMetadata has no createdAt)
Checkpoint summaries contain intent and openItems fields accessible via latestCheckpoint.summary
Server logs go to /tmp/gossamer-server.log; DB is at ~/.claude/hook-handler.db

code.finding: POST /api/sessions/spawn uses query() with settingSources: ['user', 'project'] to ensure hooks fire; delete process.env.CLAUDECODE at startServer() startup; returns sessionId extracted from first 'system' event
groupClaudeTurns() merges consecutive toolGroup DisplayItems + following Stop event into a single claudeTurn RenderItem; ClaudeTurnCard renders them as one bubble with collapsible tools
Shared TimeAgo component: shows relative time, tooltip with absolute on hover, click copies absolute to clipboard
React context for breadcrumb state shared between Layout header and child pages without prop drilling
AppShell.Header must span full viewport width to keep hamburger visible when sidebar is collapsed; use useDisclosure for sidebar toggle
TypeScript declaration needed for PNG imports: declare module '*.png' { const src: string; export default src; }
Must use .cjs extension for PostCSS config in Vite ESM projects; requires postcss-preset-mantine and postcss-simple-vars with mantine breakpoint variables

workflow: light-dark(lightValue, darkValue) CSS function is the correct pattern for Mantine v7 theme-aware colors; Mantine sets color-scheme on <html>; Mantine color variants like X-0 are always light regardless of scheme
Mantine's dark palette dark[0..9] should be remapped for GitHub-style themes: dark[0]=#e6edf3 (lightest text) through dark[9]=#000000
Claude Code SDK query() calls the Anthropic API directly (not the claude CLI), so hooks configured in settings.json never fire without settingSources: ['user', 'project']
Claude logo can be extracted from /Applications/Claude.app/Contents/Resources/electron.icns using: iconutil -c iconset <icns> -o <dir>
For SDK-spawned sessions, resume interactively with: claude --resume <session-id>

friction: Multiple context window exhaustions required summarization and resumption mid-task, losing some context fidelity

Dark mode required fixing hardcoded colors in 8+ files (SessionDetail, EventItem, ToolGroupItem, ToolUseItem, MarkdownView, CheckpointDetail, etc.) — Mantine X-0 color variants are always light, not theme-aware
AppShell hamburger button was initially placed inside AppShell.Main causing it to disappear when sidebar closed — required moving to AppShell.Header
SDK spawn failing silently: query() returned system/assistant/result events but no hooks fired; required debugging to discover settingSources option was needed
CLAUDECODE env var inherited from parent Claude Code process blocked all nested claude invocations; required delete process.env.CLAUDECODE at server startup
SDK's query() without settingSources makes direct API calls, bypassing the entire CLI hook system — this is a non-obvious SDK behavior
Server error logging was swallowed (fire-and-forget async), making spawn failures invisible until explicit logging was added
open_items: Spawned sessions run headlessly with no way to interact in real-time — Option A (resume via claude --resume) is implemented but requires user to copy session ID and run terminal command manually
Active Sessions breadcrumb shows user/repo from the first (most recent) session only — if sessions span multiple repos, this may be misleading
CheckpointDetail, CheckpointTimeline, and SessionTree screens were migrated to Mantine but may still have dark mode issues not yet verified
The spawnSession endpoint uses fire-and-forget with no progress streaming back to the UI — gossamer relies on polling/websocket to show session progress
No error handling if spawn fails after the session starts (the async generator error is only logged server-side)
